notes: Data fix: Cooking Station and Iron Cooking Station now surface their raw meats under Craft Materials. Filter to Cooking Station + Iron Cooking Station, flick Craft Mats on, and you'll get Boar, Deer, Neck, Chicken, Wolf, Bear, Fish, Lox, Serpent, Seeker, Hare, Bonemaw, Asksvin and Volture meat listed as the aggregated ingredients. The game stores those mappings as Smelter conversions (not standard recipes), so a synthetic 1:1 ingredient is now injected for each fire-cooked output in both the live data file and the convert-dump script so future regenerations keep it.
